title: AggregatedPortfolioResponse
description: Complete snapshot of the authenticated user's investment portfolio, organized by asset.

timestamp.description: Time at which this portfolio snapshot was calculated.

accountCurrency.description: ISO 4217 code of the account's base currency (e.g. 'USD').

instrumentAggregates.description: Positions held directly (not via copy trading), grouped by instrument.

mirrors.description: Copy-trading relationships the user has active.
